headline: Zohran Mamdani and the business exodus? New York's office real estate market is up under new mayor
summary: Reports Apollo Global Management is planning a second HQ in the US South renewed debate over a business exodus under NYC Mayor Mamdani. Data doesn't support it.

headline: A Rare Buying Window Is Opening In Asset Managers
summary: Asset managers fell with SaaS despite low exposure, as strong earnings and deep discounts now trigger heavy insider buying. Learn why the AI fears are overblown.
